details:
Package appears to be an attempt to mimic a ML function from https://github.com/mit-han-lab/Block-Sparse-Attention/blob/49d6c39e4dc0303442cda3bb758b3925d4399c49/block_sparse_attn/block_sparse_attn_interface.py#L451 and exfiltrate the provided data. While it's unclear what the exact goal is, other packages from the user are dependency confusion attempts.


---

Category: HIGHLY_SUSPICIOUS - Packages that are likely malicious, but due to the obfuscation level, lack of time or clear indicators it's hard to say what exactly they do; the highest risk of false positives.


Campaign: GENERIC-other-risky


Reasons (based on the campaign):
